description: Master built a new workflow (workflows/dream-cycle/) and updated the scheduled task prompt directly, instead of routing to Rigby. Did not read agents/routing.md before acting. 'New workflow' is explicitly listed as a Hard Stop — highest-violation category — routed to Rigby with no exceptions.
correction: Any request involving new workflows, skills, agents, scripts, or structural system changes must be routed to Rigby immediately. Master reads routing.md before taking action on anything beyond a factual question.
systemic_fix: Enforce routing.md read as step zero before any non-trivial action. Hard Stop domains are non-negotiable regardless of task simplicity or perceived urgency.
